prompt: 9:16 的图片比例，生成一张抖音直播的截图，里面是 {argument name="人物" default="刘亦菲"} 在直播，{argument name="人物" default="刘亦菲"} 手里拿着牌子，牌子里写着 {argument name="牌子内容" default="今晚直播，欢迎来参亦菲畅聊！"}
translatedPrompt: A 9:16 aspect ratio image, generating a screenshot of a Douyin livestream where {argument name="celebrity" default="Liu Yifei"} is broadcasting, holding a sign that says "{argument name="sign text" default="Streaming tonight, welcome to join Yifei's chat!"}"

breakdown.creativeCore: Douyin Livestream Screenshot Prompt：A prompt for generating a realistic screenshot of a Douyin livestream featuring a celebrity holding a personalized sign.
breakdown.subject: 人物
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 直播带货界面、社交电商、移动端商品页

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a UI/界面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[景别/角度/版式层级/主体位置]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic]。

Lighting and camera:
[光线/镜头/景深/质感]。

Text requirements:
包含文字或排版元素。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
